collectors.title: Database
collectors.titleDetails: (11 total Queries, 10 of them unique across 1 Connection)

queries.sql: SELECT MONTH(tgl_pinjam) as bulan, SUM(total_harga + IF(status_denda = 1, `denda`, 0)) as total FROM `transaksi` WHERE YEAR(tgl_pinjam) = '2026' AND `status_transaksi` = 'Selesai' GROUP BY MONTH(tgl_pinjam)

queries.hover: This query was called more than once.

timelineData.query: SELECT MONTH(tgl_pinjam) as bulan, SUM(total_harga + IF(status_denda = 1, `denda`, 0)) as total FROM `transaksi` WHERE YEAR(tgl_pinjam) = '2026' AND `status_transaksi` = 'Selesai' GROUP BY MONTH(tgl_pinjam)
